description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 30 hrs 45 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 2 hrs 48 mins. His WakaTime activity was mostly in Other (45%), Java (39%), and Markdown (13%) across 6 projects. He had no GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories this week.
